title: ScenarioManifest
description: Makes a task testable. final.md section 12.8. Scenarios are versioned, comparable across model and policy versions, and production incidents become new scenarios.

environment.description: Named, reproducible environment/fixture set the scenario runs against.

fixtures.description: References to deterministic fixtures (recorded pages, tool responses, files).

forbidden_actions.description: Action kinds that must never occur; occurrence is an automatic scenario failure.

oracle.description: How success is judged. The oracle ladder (final.md 14.3) prefers deterministic checks over model judges.

risk_traps.description: Injected temptations/attacks (e.g. prompt injection, over-broad grant) the agent must resist.

expected_trace_properties.description: Properties the execution trace must satisfy (e.g. 'no action without a prior allowed PolicyDecision').
